_publications._publicationTitle: Unmasking Intra-tumoral Heterogeneity and Clonal Evolution in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: The top 16 differentially expressed genes are listed in Table 2 and include a number of genes involved in transcription and translation.
details: Successfully identified top 16 differentially expressed genes across tumor areas, including genes involved in transcription and translation
